content.claim: Hungary's teaching workforce is aging and geographically concentrated: half of all teachers in 2024/2025 were aged 50 or older with only 7.2% under 30. Teacher shortages are greatest in rural areas, where the proportion of unqualified teachers in disadvantaged schools is 2-3 times higher than in non-disadvantaged schools.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Demography lens
limitations: Describes current capacity constraints but does not measure adequacy relative to projected SEN identification trends
Does not quantify specialist gaps (speech therapists, sign language interpreters, etc.) separately from general teacher shortages
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
